name: @tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm
description: A simple package to manage BIP-32 wallets for evm blockchains.
author: Tether

scripts.test:integration: concurrently -k -s first -n "NODE,TEST" -c "black,green" --hide NODE "npx hardhat node --network hardhat" "npm run test-integration-wait"
scripts.test-integration-wait: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration --runInBand
scripts.test:integration:coverage: concurrently -k -s first -n "NODE,TEST" -c "black,green" --hide NODE "npx hardhat node --network hardhat" "npm run test-integration-wait:coverage"
scripts.test-integration-wait:coverage: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration --coverage --runInBand
